RK_Scenario_Bandits_EveryoneHatesUs.desc: The world has turned its back on us, and we have done the same. In this scenario, everyone is your enemy. There is no diplomacy, only retaliation. We will build our sanctuary on the bones of those who loathe us. Radical struggle for survival begins now.
RK_Scenario_Bandits_EveryoneHatesUs.scen: A radical bandit horde that has become the enemy of the entire world. Survival is the only law.
